characters.appearance: Young boy, approximately 10-12 years old, slim build, brown complexion, short black hair. He has a clean-shaven, youthful face.
characters.wardrobe: White short-sleeved button-up shirt, blue and red striped tie, and dark blue trousers.
characters.demeanor: Confident, expressive, and frequently gesturing with his hands.

characters.appearance: Middle-aged man, medium build, brown complexion, short black hair, and a mustache.
characters.wardrobe: Dark blue suit jacket, light blue shirt, and a dark tie.
characters.demeanor: Static, smiling, and occasionally clapping in a looped manner.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: जो आज से ही डेली इंग्लिश बोलने की प्रैक्टिस करेगा ना, वो अपनी ड्रीम जॉब में बैठेगा। [Whoever practices speaking English daily from today, will sit in their dream job.]
Character A says: और जो डरता रहेगा, वो बस दूसरों को आगे बढ़ते हुए देखेगा। [And whoever keeps fearing, will just watch others move ahead.]
Character A says: अब तुम लोग बोलोगे कि रोज़ इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस करनी है, तो भाई हमें तो महँगी कोचिंग जाना पड़ेगा, कोई बड़ा कोर्स लेना पड़ेगा। [Now you guys will say that to practice English daily, brother we will have to go to expensive coaching, take some big course.]
Character A says: हमारा बहुत पैसा लग जाएगा, और टाइम भी तो नहीं है। [It will cost us a lot of money, and we don't have time either.]
Character A says: भाई, मैं जो तरीका बताने वाला हूँ ना, वो एकदम अफोर्डेबल और आसान है। [Brother, the method I am going to tell you, is completely affordable and easy.]
Character A says: तुमको सिर्फ एक काम करना है, डाउनलोड करनी है Supernova ऐप। [You just have to do one thing, download the Supernova app.]
Character A says: अब बोलोगे, ये Supernova ऐप क्या है भाई? [Now you'll say, what is this Supernova app brother?]
Character A says: Supernova ऐप पर इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस के लिए एक AI ट्यूटर है। [There is an AI tutor on the Supernova app for English practice.]
Character A says: तुम लोगों को भाई पहले रियल-लाइफ सिचुएशन में बात करना सीखना है, जैसे इंटरव्यू देना है। [You guys brother first have to learn to talk in real-life situations, like giving an interview.]
Character A says: कस्टमर से कैसे बात करनी है, ऑफिस में कैसे बोलना है। [How to talk to a customer, how to speak in the office.]
Character A says: उसके बाद बिना अटके सेंटेंस बनाना सीखना है, पूरे कॉन्फिडेंस के साथ। [After that learn to make sentences without getting stuck, with full confidence.]
Character A says: छोटी-छोटी गलतियों से लेकर फर्राटेदार इंग्लिश बोलने तक का सफर तय करना है। [Have to cover the journey from small mistakes to speaking fluent English.]
Character A says: सब कुछ Supernova ऐप पर तुम लोग सीख जाओगे। [You guys will learn everything on the Supernova app.]
Character A says: करना क्या है? ये जो फोन पे टिप-टिप करते रहते हो ना, रील्स देख रहे हो। [What to do? This tip-tip you keep doing on the phone, watching reels.]
Character A says: टाइम वेस्ट कर रहे हो, दूसरों को लाइक मार रहे हो, ये सब बंद करो। [Wasting time, hitting like for others, stop all this.]
Character A says: थोड़ा टाइम अपने करियर को दो, Supernova ऐप को डाउनलोड करो। [Give some time to your career, download the Supernova app.]
Character A says: रोज़ सिर्फ 15 मिनट दो, और अपनी इंग्लिश में खुद फर्क देखो, ठीक है? [Give only 15 minutes daily, and see the difference in your English yourself, okay?]
Character A says: इंग्लिश अगर बोलनी है ना भाई, तो रोज़ प्रैक्टिस करनी पड़ेगी। [If you want to speak English brother, then you will have to practice daily.]
Character A says: और उसका सबसे सही तरीका है, Supernova ऐप। [And its most correct method is, Supernova app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the audience by contrasting career success with stagnation, replacing the aggressive BMW/Tempo comparison with a relatable 'dream job' vs 'watching others succeed' scenario.
- Addresses the common pain points of expensive coaching and lack of time.
- Introduces Supernova's AI tutor and highlights real-world speaking practice (interviews, customers) instead of basic grammar drills.
- Delivers a strong CTA to stop wasting time on reels and practice for 15 minutes daily to build confidence.

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: तो इंस्टॉल बटन पे क्लिक करो और Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [So click on the install button and download the Supernova app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides a clear, direct call to action.
- Visually reinforces the brand with the app logo and install button.

- Displays standard legal and educational disclaimers.
- Manages user expectations regarding guaranteed results.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Supernova kisi bhi government authority institution brand, organisation ya individual ke dwara endorsed, sponsored, affiliated ya associated nahi hai. Kisi bhi names trademarks logos ya references ka use sirf educational aur informational purposes ke liye kiya gaya hai Kuch content sirf representational ho sakta hai Supernova kisi bhi guaranteed results ka promise nahi karta Outcomes individual effort aur doosre factors par depend karte hain aur vary kar sakte hain.

brand_swaps_detected.supernova_swap: दूसरों को आगे बढ़ते हुए देखेगा [watch others move ahead]
खुद फर्क देखो [see the difference yourself]
